reasoning: The order shows Status = Complete, but Total Paid is $0.00 and payment method is Check / Money Order, indicating the order was never paid. Additionally, no shipment or delivery confirmation is visible on the order view to verify whether the package was actually shipped or delivered. Since a refund cannot be processed for an unpaid order and delivery status cannot be confirmed from the current information, this case requires escalation to verify payment receipt and shipment/tracking details before any refund decision can be made.
